title: pterocaulon glandulosum
intro: Pterocaulon glandulosum, also known as False Dragon's Blood, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pterocaulon glandulosum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
